items.description: Subscription billing fintech Skio sold to its competitor Recharge in what was a healthy exit, according to its founder and former CEO.

items.description: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

items.description: The two wildly fast-growing rivals have raised massive sums, pushed into each other's home turf, and now have dueling ad campaigns.

items.title: Rivian downsizes DOE loan to $4.5B for Georgia factory
items.description: Rivian has reworked its loan deal with the Department of Energy and now expects to borrow $4.5 billion to build its new factory in Georgia, down from the original amount of $6.6 billion.

items.title: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites
items.description: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.

items.title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
items.description: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

items.title: EV startup Faraday Future paid $7.5M to company tied to founder Jia Yueting
items.description: The perpetually struggling EV company made the payments while being investigated by the SEC. That four-year probe was ultimately closed in March.

items.title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
items.description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

items.description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

items.title: TikTok’s new ‘Campus Hub’ features college group chats and feeds
items.description: The new hub features dedicated college group chats and personalized feeds designed to help students stay connected with their campus communities, even while they’re away for the summer.

items.title: Stripe introduces Link, a digital wallet that autonomous AI agents can use, too
items.description: Link lets users connect cards, banks, and subscriptions, then authorize AI agents to spend securely via approval flows.

items.title: Salesforce is crowdsourcing its AI roadmap — with customers
items.description: Salesforce lets its customers lead its product roadmap with the thinking that if one enterprise customer has a problem, the others likely do too.

items.title: Uber taps Hertz to clean, charge, and fix its Lucid Motors robotaxis
items.description: Hertz is creating a new affiliate company called "Oro Mobility" to provide fleet management solutions "across a range of mobility segments."

items.description: The security bug is now fixed, but the patient who found it said it was challenging to alert the software company about the issue.
